theme_json.heroSubcopy: Simple ingredients, intentional formulas, and direct-from-maker quality.
theme_json.heroHeadline: Small-batch tallow skincare, crafted at home

store_settings.fulfillment_message: Orders are hand-packed with care and usually ship within 2-4 business days. You’ll receive tracking as soon as your package is on the way.
store_settings.shipping_policy: We currently ship within the U.S. Orders are processed in 2-4 business days, then sent via standard tracked shipping. Shipping cost is calculated at checkout based on destination and package weight. You’ll receive a tracking update once your label is created.
store_settings.return_policy: Because our products are personal-care items, we cannot accept returns on opened or used products. If your order arrives damaged or there is an issue with your shipment, contact us within 7 days of delivery and we’ll make it right.
store_settings.announcement: Hand-poured in small batches. Free local pickup each Friday.
store_settings.footer_tagline: Traditional tallow care, thoughtfully made for modern homes.
store_settings.footer_note: At Home Apothecary crafts small-batch tallow goods with simple ingredients and intentional process.
store_settings.about_article_html:
About Article Draft

At Home Apothecary was born from a simple belief: skincare should be nourishing, intentional, and made with ingredients you can trust.

What started as small batches made at home for family and friends has grown into a daily ritual shared with our community. Every product is made with care, using thoughtfully selected ingredients and a process that favors quality over speed.

We focus on formulas that support skin health without unnecessary fillers. Our approach is rooted in simplicity: fewer ingredients, purposeful combinations, and textures that feel rich and restorative.

Our Standards

  • Small-batch production for consistency and freshness

  • Ingredient-first formulation

  • Handmade with care, not mass manufactured

  • Honest products designed for everyday use

Why We Make It This Way

Modern routines can feel complicated. We want skincare to feel grounding again: a moment to slow down, care for yourself, and use products that do exactly what they promise.

From Our Home to Yours

Each order is packed by hand and sent with care. We’re grateful to be part of your routine, and we take that responsibility seriously.

Thank you for supporting independent, small-batch skincare.

policy_faqs.answer: Most orders are packed and shipped within 2 to 4 business days. You will receive tracking by email once your package is on the way.
policy_faqs.question: When will my order ship?

policy_faqs.answer: Returns are accepted according to the return policy listed on this page. Please contact support before sending items back.
policy_faqs.question: What is your return policy?

policy_faqs.answer: If you need help, email support and include your order number so we can assist quickly.
policy_faqs.question: How do I get help with my order?

store_settings.email_capture_description: Be first to hear about new releases, restocks, and occasional offers. Unsubscribe anytime.
store_settings.email_capture_success_message: Thanks for subscribing. You are on the list.
store_settings.checkout_order_note_prompt: If you have any questions, comments, or concerns about your order, leave a note below.

store_content_blocks.title: Simple Ingredients, Honest Care
store_content_blocks.body: We keep formulas focused and purposeful, using time-honored ingredients chosen for daily skin support.
